description: Hooks add predictability/guarantees to the-loop's PDLC process. v0 ships a SessionStart reminder that surfaces the project's the-loop config so the harness loads its rules. Quality gates (lint/typecheck/test) are documented for projects to wire to their own tooling, since commands are project-specific.

hooks.command: test -f .the-loop/config.yaml && echo 'the-loop is initialized in this repo. Operating rules: plan→execute→self/critic-review→escalate. See .the-loop/config.yaml and the the-loop skill.' || true
